description_long: This figure depicts an adult male with spiky hair, wearing a long, open-front coat with wide sleeves and a high collar, over a fitted jumpsuit. The coat features circular markings on the sleeves and back, and the jumpsuit is adorned with a ring-shaped belt and additional circular motifs. The individual has a headband with a prominent forehead protector and facial markings, and is surrounded by six floating black orbs arranged in a circular pattern behind him. His hands are extended slightly outward, and he wears open-toed footwear with bandaged ankles. The overall appearance is stylized and reminiscent of a character from a fantasy or anime universe, with a dramatic and heroic stance.
description: A stylized adult male in a long coat and jumpsuit, with spiky hair, facial markings, and six floating black orbs behind him. The figure stands upright with arms slightly outstretched, exuding a dramatic, heroic presence.
description_view_0: Front view shows the facial markings, headband, open coat, and the arrangement of six black orbs behind the figure.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the spiky hair, profile of the face, and the vertical alignment of the floating orbs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the coat with circular motifs, the full arrangement of orbs, and the back of the headband and hair.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, coat sleeve, and the vertical stack of orbs.
attribute_clothing_type: long open-front coat with wide sleeves over a fitted jumpsuit, headband, and bandaged ankles
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
